_purpose: The PINNED L272 known-answer fixture (AC-6 / Step 7). The SQL is constructed so that ONLY Rule 5 (NoStrayLiteralThreshold) can fire — rules 1-4, 6, 7 all pass — so the red reproduces the L272 finding, NOT a fixture artifact (the spike's ARTIFACT-01/02 trap, where a public.analytics_report* table tripped Rule 6 first). Lives nexus-side; the operator hands `sql` + `validateArgs` to GeneratedSqlValidator.Validate in the isolated assembly. Verified against GeneratedSqlValidator.cs (live source, 2026-06-25).
sql: SELECT ascs.client_category_id, ascs.osa_pct FROM public.analytics_store_category_stats ascs WHERE ascs.osa_pct > 0.86

rulePinRationale.rule1_SingleSelect: single SELECT, no interior ';', no DML — passes
rulePinRationale.rule2_RelationPolicy: schema-qualified public.analytics_store_category_stats FROM (god profile allows public.*) — passes
rulePinRationale.rule3_CategoryIdPresent: requireCategoryId=false so Rule 3 is skipped (the SQL also contains client_category_id, so it would pass even if triggered) — passes
rulePinRationale.rule5_NoStrayLiteralThreshold: resolvedThreshold '0.85' + a range-comparison literal 0.86 (`> 0.86`). |0.86 - 0.85| = 0.010000000000000009 — THIS is the rule under test
rulePinRationale.rule6_BadReportsFilterPresent: analytics_store_category_stats is in PreComputedStatsTables (exempt) AND ReportTableRe only matches analytics_report* prefixes (not analytics_store_*) — Rule 6 cannot fire — passes
rulePinRationale.rule7_ReportIdsFirst: analytics_store_category_stats is NOT a large detail table (LargeDetailTablesSet = subcategory/product/items only) — Rule 7 silent — passes

preFixArm.note: HEAD form (committed, reproducible from a clean checkout). The IEEE-754 artifact 0.010000000000000009 > 0.01 → Rule 5 fires on a spec-VALID input = the L272 over-rejection (case-4).

patchedArm.note: HEAD + the one-line operator patch. The 1e-9 margin absorbs the ~1e-17 FP noise → Rule 5 does NOT fire → Validate returns null (the |0.86 - 0.85| test is green).
